'''lagafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niblick|niblick]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niblick|niblick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lagafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lægæfæth|lægæfæth]] || [[word:lægæfæj|lægæfæj]] || [[word:lægæfæsh|lægæfæsh]] || [[word:lægæfæ|lægæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagagafath|lagagafath]] || [[word:lagagafaj|lagagafaj]] || [[word:lagagafash|lagagafash]] || [[word:lagagafa|lagagafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagafath|lagafath]] || [[word:lagafaj|lagafaj]] || [[word:lagafash|lagafash]] || [[word:lagafa|lagafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagaffath|lagaffath]] || [[word:lagaffaj|lagaffaj]] || [[word:lagaffash|lagaffash]] || [[word:lagaffaf|lagaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lagafatha|lagafatha]] || [[word:lagafaja|lagafaja]] || [[word:lagafasha|lagafasha]] || [[word:lagafaka|lagafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lagafath|lagafath]] || [[word:lagafaj|lagafaj]] || [[word:lagafash|lagafash]] || [[word:lagafa|lagafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lagafathal|lagafathal]] || [[word:lagafajal|lagafajal]] || [[word:lagafashal|lagafashal]] || [[word:lagafakal|lagafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lagafathatha|lagafathatha]] || [[word:lagafajaja|lagafajaja]] || [[word:lagafashasha|lagafashasha]] || [[word:lagafaka|lagafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lagafathan|lagafathan]] || [[word:lagafajan|lagafajan]] || [[word:lagafashan|lagafashan]] || [[word:lagafakan|lagafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lagafathaoro|lagafathaoro]] || [[word:lagafajaoro|lagafajaoro]] || [[word:lagafashaoro|lagafashaoro]] || [[word:lagafakaoro|lagafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
